What I Do

Expert Digital Marketing Services

From ad account setup to full-funnel strategy — everything your business needs to scale profitably online.

📊
Meta Ads Management
Facebook & Instagram campaigns with full funnel strategy, daily optimization, and weekly performance reports.
🔍
Google Search Ads
High-intent keyword campaigns that capture buyers actively searching for your products and services.
🎯
Pixel & Tracking Setup
Pixel, CAPI, and event setup done right so you know exactly where your conversions come from.
🔄
Retargeting Strategy
Cross-platform retargeting to re-engage warm audiences and maximize your ad spend efficiency.
📹
YouTube Video Ads
Video ad campaigns on YouTube to build brand awareness and drive consideration at scale.
📋
Ad Account Audit
One-time deep audit of your ad account to identify wasted spend and missed opportunities.

🔧 Ad Account & Business Manager Fix
Diagnosis and resolution of disabled ad accounts, payment method issues, or Business Manager verification problems.

Complete installation of the Facebook Pixel and Conversions API (CAPI) with ViewContent, AddToCart, InitiateCheckout, and Purchase events — so you track every customer action precisely.
🎯 Deep Audience Research
Comprehensive research to identify your perfect customer avatar — high-performing interests, behaviors, and demographics to target with precision.
🚀 Single Campaign Setup
Your first professional ad campaign built from scratch (Traffic, Sales, or Message objective) — optimised and ready to launch.

I'm Khandakar Nakibul Akhter — a Digital Strategist and CSE Graduate who combines creative marketing thinking with technical data engineering to build ad systems that actually work.

Since 2022, I've managed $3,000+ in ad spend for businesses including Royan Apparels and BD Fishing Store — scaling the latter to over 1.8 Million BDT in revenue within 6 months on a $1,000 budget.

I don't just "run ads." I use data logic to lower your costs, fix tracking issues others miss, and build full-funnel strategies that turn cold audiences into loyal customers. Fluent in English & Bengali.

My Process

How We Work Together

A simple, transparent process from first call to running campaigns — no confusion, no surprises.

1
Free Consultation
Book a free 30-min call. We'll discuss your goals, current situation, and the best strategy for your business.
2
Strategy & Onboarding
I audit your existing accounts, define your target audience, and build a custom ad strategy.
3
Campaign Launch
Campaigns go live with tracking set up correctly. You provide the ad budget directly to the platform.
4
Optimize & Scale
Daily optimization, weekly reports, and ongoing refinement to lower costs and grow your revenue.

Refund & Cancellation

Refund Policy

Effective January 2026. As a service-based business involving human hours and intellectual expertise, the following terms apply to all packages.

Policy 01
Ad Spend — No Refund
  • Money paid to advertising platforms (Meta, Google, YouTube) goes directly to them via your card.
  • I cannot refund any ad spend — this money goes to the platforms, not me.
  • If your ad account gets restricted or ads underperform due to platform algorithms, this cost is non-recoverable.
Policy 02
Quick Fix Package (4,000 BDT)
  • Non-Refundable once the Audit is delivered or Campaign Setup is completed.
  • The value — expertise and setup work — has already been delivered at that point.
Policy 03
Monthly Packages (12k & 20k / Month)
  • 100% Refund if you cancel before strategy/setup work has started.
  • 50% Non-Refundable if campaign setup is done but ads haven't gone live yet.
  • Non-Refundable once ads are active and monthly management has begun.
Policy 04
Cancellation of Service
  • You may cancel the monthly service at any time.
  • Please provide at least 3 days' notice before the next billing cycle to avoid being charged for the next month.
⚖️ Results Disclaimer: I guarantee strategic execution — targeting, pixel setup, A/B testing, and daily optimization. However, I cannot guarantee specific sales or leads numbers, as results depend on market demand, your product price, website speed, and customer service — factors outside my control. Poor sales performance is not a valid ground for a refund if technical ad management was executed correctly.
